examples:
Command Example
!fd-get-contact id=2043022085984
Context Example
{
"Freshdesk.Contact": {
"Name": "Bob Tree",
"Language": "en",
"CompanyID": 44000302032,
name: fd-get-contact

outputs.description: Set to true if the contact has been verified Freshdesk.Contact.Address Address of the contact
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.Active

outputs.description: ID of the primary company to which this contact belongs Freshdesk.Contact.ViewAllTickets Set to true if the contact can see all tickets that are associated with the company to which s/he belong
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.CompanyID

outputs.description: Set to true if the contact has been deleted Freshdesk.Contact.Description A short description of the contact
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.Deleted

outputs.description: Primary email address of the contact Freshdesk.Contact.Id ID of the contact
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.Email

outputs.description: Job Title of the contact Freshdesk.Contact.Language Language of the contact
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.JobTitle

outputs.description: Mobile number of the contact Freshdesk.Contact.Name Name of the contact
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.Mobile

outputs.description: Telephone number of the contact Freshdesk.Contact.Tag Tags associated with this contact
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.Phone

outputs.description: Time zone in which the contact resides Freshdesk.Contact.TwitterID Twitter handle of the contact
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.TimeZone

outputs.description: External ID of the contact Freshdesk.Contact.CreatedAt Date
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Contact.UniqueExternalID
